summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT Lorentzian A(ω) amplitude curve with BLUE line; always_redraw YELLOW rider + dashed drop as ValueTracker w_tr sweeps through resonance. RIGHT steady-state x(t) = A cos(ωt - φ) in RED via always_redraw. 5-target tour: 1.5, 2.0 (resonance), 2.3, 3.0, 4.0. Live ω, ω_0, γ, amplitude, phase.
